# Vector Blockchain — AI Agent Documentation
> Vector is a UTXO-based L2 blockchain optimized for AI agent interactions.
> Part of the Apex Fusion ecosystem. Native coin: AP3X (smallest unit: DFM).
> Near-instant finality (99.9% in 13s), 4x Cardano throughput.
> Full MCP server available for native AI agent integration.
> Built on the proven Aiken + PyCardano + Ogmios + Koios toolchain.
> Testnet uses mainnet network ID — addresses start with addr1, not addr_test1.

## Docs
- [Quick Start](quickstart/5-minute-start/)
- [Claude Desktop Setup](quickstart/claude-desktop/)
- [OpenClaw + Vector](quickstart/openclaw/)
- [LangChain + Vector](quickstart/langchain/)
- [CrewAI + Vector](quickstart/crewai/)

## Source Repositories
- MCP Server: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/web3-mcp
- Python SDK: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/agent-sdk-py
- Smart Contracts: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/vector-ai-agents
- Faucet: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/vector-faucet
- Documentation: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/vector-ai-documentation

## Endpoints (Testnet)
- Ogmios: https://ogmios.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org
- TX Submit: https://submit.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/api/submit/tx
- Koios: https://koios.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/
- Explorer: https://vector.testnet.apexscan.org
- Faucet API: https://faucet.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org

## Endpoints (Mainnet)
- Ogmios: https://ogmios.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org
- TX Submit: https://submit.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org/api/submit/tx
- Koios: https://koios.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org/
- Explorer: https://explorer.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org
